prompt:
Use case: stylized-concept
Asset type: project-bound RPG world atlas map, landscape orientation
Primary request: Gloomhaven / City of Lions inspired world map for the terrain type diverse_archipelago.
Scene/backdrop: a vast Misty Sea dark fantasy world of many island groups and microcontinents, grim harbor city-states, mercenary contract islands, dungeon entrances, ancient catacomb islands, demon-infested ruined citadels, frozen northern isles, dark forest islands, cursed swamp chains, volcanic rift islands, haunted reefs and forgotten empire ruins.
Style/medium: high-resolution illustrated tactical RPG atlas, gloomy overcast atmosphere, muted parchment, iron-grey water, inked relief terrain, scenario-map style, dungeon-crawl symbols and grim mercenary fantasy tone.
Composition/framing: wide landscape world map with uneven island clusters; include large islands, tiny islets, crescent island arcs, lagoons, reef belts, narrow straits, remote atolls, fragmented cliffs and microcontinents with no grid-like spacing; include compass, route lines, dungeon icons and worn border ornaments without readable text.
Geography constraints: islands must vary strongly in size and shape, with complex coastlines, broken shores, curved bays, peninsulas, fjords, deltas, marshy estuaries, volcanic scars and abyssal rifts; show many climates and biomes across the archipelago including snowfields, dark forests, swamps, rocky wastelands, misty coasts, haunted ruins and bleak highlands.
Avoid: evenly spaced islands, cheerful tropical colors, simple pirate map, bright heroic fantasy, modern satellite image, readable labels, UI, watermark, logo, real-world map copy.
